author: Yima
description: Turn lecture PDFs and course materials into structured Markdown notes with LLM chat and RAG. - This plugin has not been manually reviewed by Obsidian staff.

manifest.author: Yima Gu
manifest.description: AI course assistant: PDF/slides → Markdown notes, OCR, LLM chat with @ notes & local RAG (DeepSeek/Kimi). 课件PDF转笔记、识图OCR、大模型聊天与课程检索。
manifest.name: Lecture Lens

name: Lecture Lens

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
## What's Changed
* Release 1.1.5 — community review fixes by @Yima-Gu in https://github.com/Yima-Gu/obsidian-lecture-lens/pull/28


**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/Yima-Gu/obsidian-lecture-lens/compare/1.1.4...1.1.5

releases.author: Yima-Gu
releases.description:
## 新功能 / Added

- **上下文管理：** 按字符预算智能分配附加笔记、RAG 片段与对话历史（从最新轮次向前填充）
- **模型自适应：** 切换 provider/模型时，根据 `context_length` 自动调整上下文预算、历史轮数、RAG top-K
- **上下文面板：** 显示裁剪提示（省略的历史轮数、丢弃的 RAG 片段、预算警告）
- **供应商：** Kimi / DeepSeek 支持从 API 动态拉取模型列表（24h 缓存）
- **引用：** 回复中支持 Obsidian wiki 链接引用（`[[笔记#章节]]`）

## 修复 / Fixed

- **引用：** 不再重复引用历史轮次中无关或已删除的笔记链接，仅保留**当前请求**中的来源
- **引用：** 发送给模型前自动剥离历史回复中的「参考来源」脚注
- **推理模型：** Kimi k2 / DeepSeek 推理模型使用 `temperature: 1`（API 要求）

## 改进 / Changed

- **Chat UI：** Cursor 风格输入区、简化上下文面板
- **README / manifest：** 提升社区插件搜索可发现性

---

## 安装 / Install

**Obsidian 社区插件（推荐）：** 设置 → 第三方插件 → 浏览 → **Lecture Lens** → 更新到 **1.1.4** → 重载

**手动安装：** 下载下方全部附件到 `<vault>/.obsidian/plugins/lecture-lens/`

**最低 Obsidian 版本：** 1.8.7

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
## 重要：从 Obsidian 插件市场安装的用户请更新到此版本

Obsidian 社区插件目录**只会分发** `main.js`、`manifest.json` 和 `styles.css`，不会包含构建时生成的运行时二进制文件。在 **1.1.2** 及更早版本中，从插件市场安装后会出现：

- 本地 embedding / RAG：**`ort-wasm-simd.wasm is missing from the plugin folder`**
- PDF 笔记生成：**`Setting up fake worker failed`**（Windows 上 `app://` 路径加载 worker 失败）

**1.1.3 已修复：** 当插件目录缺少 WASM 或 PDF worker 时，插件会通过 Obsidian 的 `requestUrl` 从 jsDelivr CDN 自动下载，并以 Blob URL 加载，无需手动从 GitHub Release 复制文件。

> 首次使用 embedding 或 PDF 功能需要联网（一次性下载约 10 MB 的 WASM / worker 文件）。

---

## Important: Update if you installed from Obsidian Community Plugins

The community catalog ships only `main.js`, `manifest.json`, and `styles.css` — not the ONNX WASM binaries or PDF.js worker bundled in GitHub Releases. In **1.1.2** and earlier, market installs could fail with:

- Local embedding / RAG: **`ort-wasm-simd.wasm is missing from the plugin folder`**
- PDF notes: **`Setting up fake worker failed`** (including Windows `app://` worker paths)

**1.1.3 fixes this** by downloading missing runtime files from jsDelivr via Obsidian `requestUrl` and loading them as Blob URLs. No manual asset copy required.

> First use of embedding or PDF features requires network access (~10 MB one-time download).

---

## 其他改进 / Other improvements

- **Chat:** 流式回答期间实时渲染 Markdown（节流更新），不再等整段结束才格式化
- **Chat:** 仅当消息列表已贴底时才自动滚动，向上阅读历史时不会被拽回底部
- **Chat:** 过宽 Markdown 表格支持横向滚动
- **README:** 社区插件安装步骤置顶，精简冗余说明

---

## 安装 / Install

**Obsidian 社区插件（推荐）：** 设置 → 第三方插件 → 浏览 → 搜索 **Lecture Lens** → 更新到 **1.1.3** → 重载 Obsidian

**手动安装：** 下载下方全部附件到 `<vault>/.obsidian/plugins/lecture-lens/`

## 最低 Obsidian 版本 / Minimum Obsidian version

**1.8.7**

---

**Full Changelog:** https://github.com/Yima-Gu/obsidian-lecture-lens/compare/1.1.2...1.1.3

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
## What's Changed
* Verify infrastructure setup for Lecture Lens plugin by @Copilot in https://github.com/Yima-Gu/obsidian-lecture-lens/pull/6
* feat(settings): harden validation, security warnings, and UI consistency by @Yima-Gu in https://github.com/Yima-Gu/obsidian-lecture-lens/pull/7
* Implement LLM service layer with OpenAI API compatibility by @Copilot in https://github.com/Yima-Gu/obsidian-lecture-lens/pull/8
* Implement image extraction and Base64 encoding for multimodal LLM requests by @Copilot in https://github.com/Yima-Gu/obsidian-lecture-lens/pull/9
* Add ribbon icon and analysis modal for lecture image analysis by @Copilot in https://github.com/Yima-Gu/obsidian-lecture-lens/pull/10
* Add streaming output, batch per-image processing, and prompt templates by @Copilot in https://github.com/Yima-Gu/obsidian-lecture-lens/pull/13
* feat: chat UI, i18n, provider presets, secure API key storage by @Yima-Gu in https://github.com/Yima-Gu/obsidian-lecture-lens/pull/14
* ci: sync release workflow and README license badge to master by @Yima-Gu in https://github.com/Yima-Gu/obsidian-lecture-lens/pull/15
* fix: release workflow pdf worker filename by @Yima-Gu in https://github.com/Yima-Gu/obsidian-lecture-lens/pull/16

## New Contributors
* @Yima-Gu made their first contribution in https://github.com/Yima-Gu/obsidian-lecture-lens/pull/7

**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/Yima-Gu/obsidian-lecture-lens/commits/1.1.0
